title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API and model library.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Python library that provides an Ollama integration for building LLM applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama with promise-based API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama with streaming and async support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat interface, model management, and API.

title: chainlit
summary: Python library with built-in Ollama integration for building conversational AI apps.

title: PrivateGPT
summary: Private local Q&A system using Ollama for fully private document querying.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) example using Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with Ollama models directly in Discord.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot integration for Ollama with group and private chat support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama enabling pipeline-based LLM workflows.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama with Spring Boot starter and fluent API.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async Ollama client with Tokio support.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-based process management.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for integrating Ollama into mobile and desktop apps.

title: ollama-go
summary: Go client for Ollama with context-aware chat sessions and model management.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n node for Ollama enabling no-code LLM workflows and automations.
